questionHtml:
Gloria wants to model the curved edge of a butterfly wing. She inserts a photo of the wing into her graphing software and finds the coordinates of four points on the edge of the wing.

Gloria thinks a cubic curve will be a good model for the butterfly wing.

 

[Source: Fleur, 2019. photo-1560263816-d704d83cce0f. [image online] Available at:
https://unsplash.com/photos/SE2zTdS1MNo [Accessed 8 February 2022]. Source adapted.]

Find the equation of the cubic regression curve for this data.
markschemeHtml:
y=-0.00855x3-0.234x2-0.225x+3.20                              A2

y=-0.00854819…x3-0.234002…x2-0.224884…x+3.20056…


Note: Award A0A1 for at least two terms correct.

 

[2 marks]

meta.title: Find the equation of the cubic regression curve for this data.
